sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_numbers (num UInt64) ENGINE = Log;
INSERT INTO test_numbers SELECT number FROM numbers(5);
SELECT num, num * 10 AS multiplied FROM test_numbers WHERE num IN (SELECT number FROM numbers(3));
UPDATE test_numbers SET num = num + 1 WHERE num < 3;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_numbers WHERE num BETWEEN (SELECT number FROM numbers(2) LIMIT 1) AND (SELECT number FROM numbers(10) LIMIT 1);
